name: Birla Tyres Limited
summary: Birla Tyres Limited manufactures and trades in tires under the Birla Tyres brand in India and internationally. The company serves original equipment manufacturers, which include scooter, motorcycle, 3-wheeler, and commercial vehicle manufacturers. Birla Tyres Limited offers its products through dealers. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
